mapper.select: SELECT ss.id, ss.course_id, ss.usual_score as usualScore, ss.midterm_score as midtermScore, ss.final_score as finalScore, ss.total_score as totalScore, ss.credit, ss.gpa, ss.status, co.course_code as courseCode, co.course_name as courseName, co.course_type as courseType FROM student_scores ss LEFT JOIN courses co ON ss.course_id = co.id WHERE ss.student_id = #{studentId} AND ss.semester_id = #{semesterId} AND ss.deleted = 0 ORDER BY co.course_code

SELECT ss.id, ss.student_id, ss.usual_score, ss.midterm_score, ss.final_score, ss.total_score, ss.gpa, s.student_no, u.real_name as student_name FROM student_scores ss LEFT JOIN students s ON ss.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND ss.course_id = #{courseId} AND ss.semester_id = #{semesterId} AND ss.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ss.final_score DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student_scores (student_id, course_id, semester_id, usual_score, midterm_score, final_score, total_score, credit, gpa, status) VALUES
(#{score.studentId}, #{score.courseId}, #{score.semesterId}, #{score.usualScore}, #{score.midtermScore}, #{score.finalScore}, #{score.totalScore}, #{score.credit}, #{score.gpa}, #{score.status})

update.foreach: UPDATE student_scores SET usual_score = #{score.usualScore}, midterm_score = #{score.midtermScore}, final_score = #{score.finalScore}, total_score = #{score.totalScore}, gpa = #{score.gpa}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{score.id}

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as course_count, SUM(credit) as total_credit, AVG(final_score) as avg_score, SUM(credit * gpa) / SUM(credit) as weighted_gpa, SUM(credit * final_score) / SUM(credit) as weighted_avg FROM student_scores WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND semester_id = #{semesterId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ss.student_id) as student_count, AVG(ss.final_score) as avg_score, MAX(ss.final_score) as max_score, MIN(ss.final_score) as min_score, SUM(CASE WHEN ss.final_score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ss.final_score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as pass_rate FROM student_scores ss LEFT JOIN students s ON ss.student_id = s.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND ss.semester_id = #{semesterId} AND ss.deleted = 0

SELECT ss.id, ss.student_id, ss.course_id, ss.semester_id, ss.usual_score, ss.midterm_score, ss.final_score, ss.total_score, ss.credit, ss.gpa, ss.status, ss.is_locked, ss.remark, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, s.student_no, u.real_name as student_name, c.id as class_id, c.class_name, co.course_code, co.course_name, co.course_type, sem.semester_name, sem.academic_year FROM student_scores ss LEFT JOIN students s ON ss.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN courses co ON ss.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN semesters sem ON ss.semester_id = sem.id WHERE ss.id = #{id} AND ss.deleted = 0

SELECT ss.id, ss.final_score, ss.gpa, s.student_no, u.real_name as student_name, c.class_name, @rank := @rank + 1 as ranking FROM student_scores ss LEFT JOIN students s ON ss.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id CROSS JOIN (SELECT @rank := 0) r WHERE ss.course_id = #{courseId} AND ss.semester_id = #{semesterId} AND ss.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ss.final_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.student_no as '学号', u.real_name as '姓名', c.class_name as '班级', co.course_name as '课程名称', co.course_type as '课程类型', ss.credit as '学分', ss.usual_score as '平时成绩', ss.midterm_score as '期中成绩', ss.final_score as '期末成绩', ss.total_score as '总评成绩', ss.gpa as 'GPA' FROM student_scores ss LEFT JOIN students s ON ss.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN courses co ON ss.course_id = co.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND ss.semester_id = #{semesterId} AND ss.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.student_no, co.course_code
